articles.title: Clarke steps down as Scotland boss after World Cup exit
articles.description: Steve Clarke resigns as Scotland head coach following the nation's group exit from the World Cup.

articles.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
articles.description: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

articles.title: US launches strikes on Iran after second shipping attack
articles.description: The US said it had hit multiple targets "in direct response to continued Iranian aggression against commercial shipping".

articles.title: Burnham will need a Moscow test as well as Makerfield test, says ex-military chief
